name: vLLM Reranker (Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B)
description: Cross-encoder reranker for hybrid FTS+vector retrieval. Multilingual, instruction-aware. CUDA only.
author: Crow

providers.description: Cross-encoder reranking via Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B (grackle, always warm)

notes: Always-warm. Use after embeddings retrieval to reorder top-K. Steady-state ~1.6GB VRAM.
